faces.name: AI Eyes
faces.description: Classic animated eyes with mood-based eyelid expressions and mouse tracking

faces.name: Halo Smoke Orb
faces.description: Halo frequency ring with wispy smoke core — calm at rest, reacts to TTS speech
faces.moods_visual_collapse: Halo only renders two visual states — 'thinking' = animated dots; any other mood = idle smoke. The full mood vocab is accepted so FaceModule.setMood routing works uniformly.
